meaning: n.(上身像衬衫的)衬衣式连衣裙
examples: Naturally, then, she accented a simple plaid shirtdress with an off-beat turquoise-studded belt.
For a slice of la dolce vita, add a couple of dresses to your core wardrobe.You should treat yourself to a shirtdress, a shift dress and an archetypal little black dress.
Baroque prints were present too on a silk shirtdress and a couple of tops.
